intake.event_framing: Assess 30-day escalation risk after a Gulf shipping strike and retaliatory warnings.
intake.current_development: Iran-backed attacks on Gulf shipping are followed by US retaliatory threats and regional force movement.
known_constraints: Energy market disruption would hurt both sides
Regional allies are pressing for restraint
known_unknowns: Whether proxy militias will act independently

summary: Neither side wants immediate total war

documents.us-iran-warning.md: The United States warns Iran that any further attacks on Gulf shipping will trigger retaliation while allies push restraint.
documents.iran-mobilization.md: Iran signals mobilization and missile readiness near the Gulf as regional diplomats attempt backchannel talks.

intake.event_framing: Assess crisis dynamics after a Japanese naval transit through the Taiwan Strait triggers a Chinese military response.
intake.current_development: A Japanese naval transit through the Taiwan Strait triggers Chinese intercept threats and emergency diplomacy.
known_constraints: Commercial shipping lanes must stay open
US alliance commitments are under scrutiny

summary: Both parties want to avoid a shooting war

documents.japan-transit.md: Japan defends the Taiwan Strait transit as lawful while China threatens an intercept and raises naval readiness.
documents.china-backchannel.md: Chinese and Japanese officials keep emergency backchannel talks open to avoid a wider clash in the strait.

intake.event_framing: Estimate escalation paths after a cross-border militant attack and military mobilization.
intake.current_development: A militant attack near the India-Pakistan border triggers mobilization, retaliatory rhetoric, and mediator pressure.
known_unknowns: Whether militant groups will attempt follow-on attacks

summary: Both governments need to signal resolve domestically

documents.border-attack.md: India accuses Pakistan-linked militants after a border attack and threatens retaliation while both armies mobilize.
documents.mediator-restraint.md: International mediators urge restraint as India and Pakistan keep diplomatic channels partially open.

intake.event_framing: Assess Apple strategy after a sudden CEO transition during product delays and margin pressure.
intake.current_development: Apple faces a sudden CEO transition after product delays, investor concern, and supplier anxiety.
known_constraints: Premium brand positioning must be preserved
known_unknowns: Whether the board will favor an internal successor

summary: The board wants stability before the next product cycle

documents.apple-succession.md: Analysts focus on Apple succession clarity, supplier reassurance, and investor concern after product delays.
documents.apple-roadmap.md: Apple product roadmap credibility and premium brand messaging are central to calming customers and suppliers.

intake.event_framing: Assess Boeing strategy after another weak quarter and renewed safety scrutiny.
intake.current_development: Boeing reports another weak quarter while safety scrutiny, delivery concerns, and customer anxiety intensify.
known_unknowns: Whether the company can stabilize production rates quickly

summary: Management needs visible operational credibility quickly

documents.boeing-quarter.md: Boeing faces investor concern, a weak quarter, and cash preservation pressure as delivery concerns mount.
documents.boeing-safety.md: Safety scrutiny and regulatory pressure are forcing Boeing to reassure customers and defend production recovery.

intake.event_framing: Assess how a major debate collapse changes the final month of a national election.
intake.current_development: A debate collapse forces both campaigns to reset strategy as party leadership scrambles to stabilize messaging.
known_unknowns: Whether swing voters interpret the event as a competency issue

summary: Turnout effects may matter more than persuasion

documents.debate-fallout.md: Party leadership scrambles to stabilize messaging after the debate while donor confidence softens.
documents.turnout-rescue.md: Campaign organizers launch a turnout rescue plan to keep early vote mobilization from collapsing.

intake.event_framing: Assess market scenarios after an unexpected emergency rate hike.
intake.current_development: An emergency rate hike shocks funding markets, credit spreads, and rate expectations.
known_unknowns: Whether dealers can absorb the repositioning cleanly

summary: Authorities will prioritize market functioning if stress worsens

documents.rate-shock.md: The emergency rate hike triggers repricing across bonds and equities while liquidity stress rises.
documents.funding-stress.md: Funding markets widen immediately and investors debate whether policy credibility has improved or deteriorated.

intake.event_framing: Assess a large ad-tech platform response to an escalating enforcement case.
intake.current_development: A competition regulator escalates an ad-tech case and signals possible structural remedies.
known_constraints: The company must protect major revenue lines
known_unknowns: Whether internal documents materially worsen the case

summary: A negotiated remedy is preferable to protracted litigation

documents.adtech-remedies.md: Regulators signal willingness to seek structural remedies while industry partners brace for disruption.
documents.adtech-remediation.md: The ad-tech platform expands internal remediation and coordinates with external counsel as enforcement momentum builds.

intake.event_framing: Assess rare-earth supply disruption after export restrictions and port delays.
intake.current_development: Export restrictions and port delays disrupt a rare-earth supply corridor for a battery maker.
known_unknowns: How quickly substitute processing routes can be certified

summary: Customers will tolerate short delays before switching suppliers

documents.rare-earth-ports.md: Port delays and export restrictions hit rare-earth materials needed by the battery maker.
documents.rare-earth-substitute.md: Procurement teams scramble to qualify alternate sources for specialized rare-earth processing.

intake.event_framing: Assess an auto supply chain after flooding shuts a single-source electronics plant.
intake.current_development: Severe flooding shuts a single-source electronics plant feeding a major automaker.
known_unknowns: Whether the supplier can restart partial output within two weeks

summary: The automaker will prioritize its highest-margin models

documents.supplier-flood.md: Flooding disrupts a single-source electronics plant and leaves the automaker with thin inventory cover.
documents.supplier-reroute.md: The automaker and logistics partners consider rerouting and alternate suppliers to keep launches alive.
